papers.title: Sumo: Dynamic and Generalizable Whole-Body Loco-Manipulation
HEX: Humanoid-Aligned Experts for Cross-Embodiment Whole-Body Manipulation
papers.summary: HEX提出人形对齐的通用状态表示和混合专家本体预测器，实现跨异构机器人的全身协调控制，在真实人形机器人上达到最先进性能。

papers.title: CMP: Robust Whole-Body Tracking for Loco-Manipulation via Competence Manifold Projection
Beyond Tools and Persons: Who Are They? Classifying Robots and AI Agents for Proportional Governance
papers.summary: 提出基于网络-物理-社会-思维四维度的机器人与AI智能体三层次分类框架，为差异化治理提供本体论基础。

companyNews.title: Tesla Optimus Gen 3 Silhouette Revealed by Program Lead - Not a Tesla App
companyNews.summary: Tesla Optimus Gen 3轮廓由项目负责人公布，展示新一代人形机器人进展。彰显Tesla加速推进类人机器人商业化，行业竞争将更加激烈。

companyNews.title: Tesla Signs New Fremont R&D Lease Ahead Of Optimus Robot Pivot - Bisnow
companyNews.summary: Tesla签署弗里蒙特新研发租约，为Optimus机器人项目扩张研发空间。此举表明Tesla正加大人形机器人布局力度，有望加速行业技术突破与商业化进程。

companyNews.title: Tesla Discontinues Model S and X to Focus on Optimus Robots - National Today
companyNews.summary: 特斯拉将停产Model S和Model X车型，全面转向Optimus人形机器人研发，显示科技巨头加速布局人机融合产业。

companyNews.title: Tesla adds China’s Sunwoda as fifth global EV battery supplier amid margin pressure - Electrek
companyNews.summary: 特斯拉新增欣旺达为第五家电池供应商以缓解成本压力，此举有助于优化供应链成本，为未来机器人业务

companyNews.title: A Chinese robotics startup with a Tesla Optimus rival is seeking a new chief scientist with an $18 million salary - Business Insider
companyNews.summary: 中国机器人初创公司开出1800万美元年薪招聘首席科学家，对标特斯拉Optimus。此举反映人形机器人领域人才竞争白热化，中国企业正加速追赶特斯拉。
